name: James Hardie Industries Plc
analysis: JHX's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 24% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.5× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$34.8900, stop A$30.8286, target A$47.0742 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
